commands.purpose: Enumerate Seasons. Filter by tenant / status / is_current / organization / branch / sport_key. Prints a table with id, tenant, name, sport, start_date, end_date, status, is_current, sort_order. Ops tooling only.

Print the resolution trace for one Season: full row + resolved phase (via SeasonPhaseCalculator, side-by-side with current status so drift is visible) + inbound reference counts (Team, AthleteEnrollment, Event, Session) + registration window analysis (open/closed/late) + last 10 audit rows when --include-audit-history.

CLI create. Only tenant + name + start_date + end_date are required. Consumes 1 season_slot per overlapping calendar year unless --system is set (reserved for migration paths). --current sets is_current=true (auto-demotes the previous current in the same scope tuple).

Flip is_current=true + auto-demote the previous current in the same scope tuple. Fires SeasonCurrentChanged (audit-critical, cannot-opt-out notification). --force-no-current-in-sibling permits demoting the current row without promoting the target — leaves the tuple current-less (rare).
Manual transition planned -> registration_open. --early bypasses the scheduled-open guardrail (owner-only permission). Fires SeasonRegistrationOpened.
Manual transition registration_open -> registration_closed. Fires SeasonRegistrationClosed. Does NOT block the late-registration window.
Manual transition to in_progress. --early bypasses the scheduled-start guardrail. Fires SeasonStarted.
Manual transition in_progress -> playoffs. Refused when has_playoffs=false. --early bypasses the scheduled-playoff-start guardrail. Fires SeasonPlayoffsBegun.
Manual transition to completed. Fires SeasonCompleted.

Soft-archive the Season + fire SeasonArchived. Refused when is_current=true OR when inbound rows exist unless --force. --force bypasses the FK check (operator confirms) — leaves referring rows pointing at a now-archived Season (they survive the retention window).
Restore an archived Season to completed status. Only within the retention window (default 2555 days). Fires SeasonRestored.

Force-run ReconcileCurrentSeasonInvariantJob. --tenant scopes to a single tenant; without it, scans every tenant. --auto-heal keeps the newest is_current row + demotes the older ones. --dry-run reports the planned actions.
Force-run RollSeasonPhaseJob. Rare — used by ops during scheduled maintenance or after an outage to catch up phase transitions the hourly cron missed. --dry-run reports the planned transitions.

One-shot: at Wave 3a deploy time, iterate every existing tenant on a seasonal business_type (sports_academy/school/federation/club) that lacks a default season + dispatch SeedDefaultSeasonForTenantJob for each. --limit chunks the run. --dry-run reports the target list. Idempotent — re-running is safe.
